title: Phase 7B: Driver UI - layout, route page, stop page, POD/COD capture
description: Build the driver-facing mobile UI: driver layout with bottom nav, today's route page with stop list and map, current stop page with delivery details, POD capture (signature + photos + GPS), COD capture, stop outcome selector, return-to-yard flow, issue escalation, and route summary/end-of-day closeout.
steps: Create src/app/(driver)/layout.tsx with driver-specific layout (bottom nav, minimal chrome)
Create src/app/(driver)/route/page.tsx with today's route (stop list + inline map)
Create src/app/(driver)/stop/[id]/page.tsx with current stop details (products, notes, contact, gate code, delivery instructions)
Create src/components/driver/pod-capture.tsx with POD capture (signature pad, multi-photo, notes, GPS stamp, timestamp)
Create src/components/driver/cod-capture.tsx with COD capture (amount due, payment type, collected amount, shortage reason)
Create src/components/driver/stop-outcome.tsx with stop outcome selector (delivered, partial, refused, no answer, etc.)
Create src/components/driver/return-flow.tsx with return-to-yard flow (returns inventory, reason)
Create src/components/driver/issue-escalation.tsx with stop issue escalation to dispatch
Create src/app/(driver)/summary/page.tsx with route summary and end-of-day closeout
